turn_info.content: Hi I am so sad my boyfriend was cheating and broke up with me when I found out. I don't think I can ever be happy again.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have always had problems with low self esteem this makes it worse. I have lost interest in everything I can barely make myself go to work.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Maybe, why would he cheat? I have seen her she is not that pretty. I thought something was going on the last few months but he kept telling me everything was fine and that it was all my imagination.

results.term: I thought I was a good girlfriend, I was loyal, ni...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I thought I was a good girlfriend, I was loyal, nice to his friends, kept the house nice, cooked for him, he never said he was unhappy he just started having to work nights and weekends a lot with no overtime he said he was salary now. I must just be unlovable.

results.term: I trusted what he told me despite my gut feeling w...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I trusted what he told me despite my gut feeling which turned out to be right. I thought we were so perfect together, I don't want him back I could never trust him again, I am not sure I could trust any guy right now, I am so hurt and confused. I don't  ever want to feel like this again.

results.term: This was the first guy I ever lived with, I  thoug...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: This was the first guy I ever lived with, I  thought we would get married one day. How do people make it through the pain, it actually hurts.

results.term: I have a couple acquaintances at work but I wouldn...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have a couple acquaintances at work but I wouldn't want to discuss my personal life with, my mom said to have  a good cry but I almost couldn't stop once I started. He was my best friend and who I talked to once we got together I didn't seem to need anyone else which looks like a mistake now. That is why I am here for support.

results.term: Have you ever had a break up of a serious relation...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Have you ever had a break up of a serious relationship or know someone who has? Does the aching inside ever get better? How long will it take?

results.term: I am sorry that happened to you but glad it turned...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I am sorry that happened to you but glad it turned out well in the end. You have a good point that it is better to know now than after we got married. I do have a nice neighbor who expressed concern when he noticed my boyfriend was gone. He said if I ever needed someone to talk to he was there. I thought he was just being nice. Maybe I should go talk to him some time maybe he was sincere.

results.term: Thank you for checking on that for me, I hope it i...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thank you for checking on that for me, I hope it is quicker I would hate to feel this way that long. I think I will go see him he is home right now. You have made me feel hopeful and that there will be an end to these feelings and maybe things will go as well for me as they did you. Thank you again.
